A.text: No two hexagons share a common edge.

B.text: Each hexagon is adjacent only to pentagons.

C.text: Each pentagon is adjacent only to hexagons.

D.text: Two pentagons share a common edge.

parsed.answer_value: Two pentagons share a common edge.
parsed.rationale: The visualization shows a structure with multiple hexagons and pentagons. Upon close inspection, it is evident that two pentagons are connected by a common edge, which matches option D.
